name: TrendPilot AI - Daily Trend Intelligence Pseudo Workflow
description: A license-safe pseudo workflow for building a daily AI-powered trend intelligence pipeline using public data sources, AI analysis, product opportunity scoring, risk level classification, human review, and report delivery.
important_notice: This is not a real n8n export file.
This file is a pseudo workflow design created for planning and educational purposes.
It should not be imported directly into n8n.
TrendPilot AI does not copy or redistribute third-party workflow exports.
Users must adapt this workflow to their own tools, APIs, permissions, and compliance requirements.
safe_use_principles: Use public and legally accessible sources only.
Do not collect private personal data.
Do not bypass login walls, paywalls, anti-bot systems, or platform restrictions.
Do not automate spam, fake engagement, fake reviews, or account farming.
Do not copy long copyrighted content into reports.
Do not copy competitor images, creator videos, or protected designs.
Do not claim guaranteed demand, sales, profit, or business success.
Add source links, confidence levels, risk notes, risk levels, and review status.
Use human review before publishing, selling, or sending reports.

recommended_stack.public_data_collection: Firecrawl, RSS feeds, public APIs, or manual source lists
recommended_stack.ai_analysis: Dify, OpenAI-compatible API, local LLM, or other LLM workflow
recommended_stack.data_storage: Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable, CSV, or database
recommended_stack.report_format: Markdown, Google Sheets, Notion, Telegram digest, email, or PDF
recommended_stack.delivery: Telegram, email, Slack, Discord, Notion, or internal dashboard
recommended_stack.human_review: Manual review step before publishing or monetization

workflow_summary.goal: Collect public trend signals, summarize them with AI, score product opportunities, classify risk level, save structured records, and generate a daily trend report.
workflow_summary.input: Public trend sources and source list records.
workflow_summary.output: Structured trend records, opportunity scores, confidence levels, risk notes, risk levels, review status, and a daily report draft.

pseudo_nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Start the daily trend intelligence workflow on a fixed schedule.
risk_notes: Avoid running too frequently.
Respect source rate limits and platform terms.

pseudo_nodes.name: Load Public Source List
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Load a curated list of public data sources to review.
risk_notes: Only include public sources.
Do not include login-protected pages.
Do not include private groups or private profiles.
Do not include scraped contact databases.

pseudo_nodes.name: Source Safety Filter
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Filter out sources that are not safe for automated collection.
checks: Does the source contain private personal data?
Does the source require bypassing restrictions?
Is the source suitable for summarization?
Is the source risk level acceptable?
risk_notes: Unsafe sources should be rejected before collection.
If uncertain, mark as Needs Review instead of collecting automatically.

pseudo_nodes.name: Collect Public Trend Signals
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Collect visible public trend signals from approved sources.
risk_notes: Do not copy full pages into reports.
Do not collect private user profiles.
Do not bypass anti-bot systems.
Do not use collected content as a republished dataset.

pseudo_nodes.name: Clean and Normalize Data
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Convert collected public signals into a consistent internal format.
normalization_steps: Shorten raw notes into source-based summaries.
risk_notes: Summaries should be original.
Avoid copying long copyrighted text.
Keep source links for traceability.
If risk level is unclear, set it to Unknown and mark output as Needs Review.

pseudo_nodes.name: AI Trend Analysis
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Analyze cleaned public signals and extract product or category opportunities.
ai_rules: Do not include private personal data.
Do not copy long source text.
Add uncertainty when evidence is weak.

pseudo_nodes.name: Product Opportunity Scoring
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Score each product idea using the TrendPilot AI 1-5 scoring model.
pseudo_nodes.formula: Opportunity Score = Demand Signal + Social Visibility + Price Potential + Supplier Availability + Differentiation Potential - Competition Level - Shipping Difficulty - Compliance Risk
risk_notes: A high score does not guarantee sales.
Scores are research signals only.
Human review is recommended before action.
Compliance Risk score and risk_level should both be recorded.

pseudo_nodes.name: Risk Check
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Review product ideas and report content for compliance, claim, platform, IP, privacy, and shipping risks.
risk_categories: Trademark, copyright, design, or IP risk
Misleading income or guaranteed result risk
risk_notes: Risk note explains the risk.
Risk level classifies the severity.
High and Avoid risk levels should not be automatically approved.

pseudo_nodes.name: Create Structured Trend Record
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Merge source data, AI trend analysis, scoring, and risk review into one structured record.

output_schema.review_status: Draft | Needs Review | Approved | Rejected | Watchlist

pseudo_nodes.name: Save to Research Log
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Save structured trend records to a reviewable storage location.
risk_notes: Do not store private personal data.
Do not store API keys in public sheets.
Manage access permissions carefully.
Use the standard source log fields, including risk_note and risk_level.

pseudo_nodes.name: Generate Daily Report Draft
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Create a daily trend intelligence report using approved or draft records.
risk_notes: Report should remain Draft until human reviewed.
Do not publish unsupported claims.
Do not remove disclaimers.
Include both risk note and risk level where useful.

pseudo_nodes.name: Human Review Gate
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Require human review before publishing, selling, or sending the report.
review_checklist: No private personal data is included.
No long copyrighted text is copied.
No platform restriction bypass is involved.
Avoid-risk ideas are excluded or rejected.
Human reviewer has checked the final report.

pseudo_nodes.name: Generate Telegram Digest
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Create a short digest from approved trend records.
risk_notes: Only send to opt-in channels or internal teams.
Do not use for spam.
Keep disclaimer included.
Avoid sending High or Avoid risk level records in top opportunities.

pseudo_nodes.name: Deliver Report
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Send the reviewed report or digest through approved delivery channels.
safe_delivery_rules: Send only to opt-in users, internal teams, or approved subscribers.
Do not send unsolicited mass messages.
Do not use scraped contact lists.

pseudo_nodes.name: Archive Report and Records
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Archive the report, source records, and review status for future reference.
risk_notes: Do not archive private personal data.
Do not publish private internal notes accidentally.
Check sharing permissions.

recommended_data_record.trend_signal: Public travel packing content shows repeated interest in compact jewelry storage.
recommended_data_record.evidence_summary: Visible public content suggests users want a cleaner way to store rings, earrings, and necklaces during travel.
recommended_data_record.target_audience: Women travelers; jewelry owners; gift buyers
recommended_data_record.pain_point: Jewelry can get tangled, scratched, or lost during travel.
recommended_data_record.content_angle: Before-and-after packing routine showing messy jewelry versus organized travel case.
recommended_data_record.risk_note: Avoid copying creator content or competitor images. Verify material claims and zipper quality.
recommended_data_record.next_action: Check marketplace pricing, review complaints, and supplier customization options.

human_review_required_before: Selling templates based on the workflow
what_this_workflow_should_not_do: Promote unsafe regulated products without review
disclaimer: This pseudo workflow is based on public data research concepts and AI-assisted analysis. It is for educational and planning purposes only. It does not guarantee product demand, sales, profit, or business success. Users should verify all sources, review platform rules, check compliance requirements, and conduct their own due diligence before making business decisions.
